{"code":"(def merged-prs (github_pull_requests {:state "merged"}))

(def prs-with-linear-closes (filter (fn [pr] (and (:closes_linear pr) 
                                        (not= (get-in (linear_issues {:id (:closes_linear pr)}) [:state]) "done"))) 
                             merged-prs))

(def result (map (fn [pr] {:pr_number (get pr :number) :linear_issue_id (:closes_linear pr)…(+57)
